FluentXMLReport.version: Fluent Version: 2d, dp, pbns, S-A (2d, double precision, pressure-based, Spalart-Allmaras) Release: 19.3.0 Title:
FluentXMLReport.Models:
Models ------
Model Settings -------------------------------------------------------------- Space 2D Time Steady Viscous Spalart-Allmaras turbulence model Production Option Strain/Vorticity Heat Transfer Disabled Solidification and Melting Disabled Species Disabled Coupled Dispersed Phase Disabled NOx Pollutants Disabled SOx Pollutants Disabled Soot Disabled Mercury Pollutants Disabled Structure Disabled
FluentXMLReport.MaterialProperties:
Material Properties -------------------
Material: air (fluid)
Property Units Method Value(s) ------------------------------------------------------------- Density kg/m3 constant 1.225 Cp (Specific Heat) j/kg-k constant 1006.43 Thermal Conductivity w/m-k constant 0.0242 Viscosity kg/m-s constant 1.8e-05 Molecular Weight kg/kmol constant 28.966 Thermal Expansion Coefficient 1/k constant 0 Speed of Sound m/s none #f
Material: aluminum (solid)
Property Units Method Value(s) --------------------------------------------------- Density kg/m3 constant 2719 Cp (Specific Heat) j/kg-k constant 871 Thermal Conductivity w/m-k constant 202.4
FluentXMLReport.CellZoneConditions:
Cell Zone Conditions --------------------
Zones
name id type ------------------------------- fluid-surface_body 3 fluid
Setup Conditions
fluid-surface_body
Condition Value --------------------- Frame Motion? no
FluentXMLReport.BoundaryConditions:
Boundary Conditions -------------------
Zones
name id type ------------------------------- inlet 6 velocity-inlet outlet 7 pressure-outlet naca0012 8 wall
Setup Conditions
inlet
Condition Value ------------------------------------- Velocity Specification Method 0 Velocity Magnitude (m/s) 88.65 Turbulent Viscosity Ratio 1
outlet
Condition Value ------------------------------------------ Backflow Turbulent Viscosity Ratio 1
naca0012
Condition Value -------------------------------- Wall Motion 0 Shear Boundary Condition 0 Wall Surface Roughness 0
FluentXMLReport.SolverSettings:
Solver Settings ---------------
Equations
Equation Solved ------------------------------------- Flow yes Modified Turbulent Viscosity yes
Numerics
Numeric Enabled --------------------------------------- Absolute Velocity Formulation yes
Relaxation
Variable Relaxation Factor ------------------------------------------------ Density 1 Body Forces 1 Modified Turbulent Viscosity 0.75 Turbulent Viscosity 1
Linear Solver
Solver Termination Residual Reduction Variable Type Criterion Tolerance ------------------------------------------------------------------------- Flow F-Cycle 0.1 Modified Turbulent Viscosity F-Cycle 0.1
Pressure-Velocity Coupling
Parameter Value -------------------------------------------- Type Coupled Pseudo Transient yes Explicit momentum under-relaxation 0.5 Explicit pressure under-relaxation 0.5
Discretization Scheme
Variable Scheme -------------------------------------------------- Pressure Second Order Momentum Second Order Upwind Modified Turbulent Viscosity Second Order Upwind
Solution Limits
Quantity Limit -------------------------------------- Minimum Absolute Pressure 1 Maximum Absolute Pressure 5e+10 Minimum Temperature 1 Maximum Temperature 5000 Maximum Turb. Viscosity Ratio 100000
